creator: pgj@FreeBSD.org
text:
This PR is connected to ports/159348, where I updated and Cabalized the git
annex port.  It involves renaming git-annex to hs-git-annex.  It is done to
enforce the naming policy usually applied on Haskell ports as it is now a
transcript of the git-annex [1] Haskell Cabal package.

For further details, please see the FreeBSD Haskell repository [2].

[1] http://hackage.haskell.org/package/git-annex
[2] https://github.com/freebsd-haskell/freebsd-haskell
